ai_profile:
**Best Kept Secret 2026 Festival Profile**  
Taking place from June 12-14, 2026, Best Kept Secret continues to live up to its name by curating a diverse lineup of 52 artists that span a wide range of genres and styles. From electronic beats to post-punk grit, hip-hop flows, and indie rock anthems, the festival promises a vibrant musical journey. With an impressive 98.1% of artists featured on Spotify, attendees can easily discover and connect with the sounds ahead of the festival.

This year’s lineup reflects a commitment to global representation and inclusivity, with artists hailing from 16 countries, including the USA, Netherlands, UK, Ghana, South Africa, and Brazil. While male artists make up a significant portion of the lineup, there is a notable presence of female, mixed-gender, and non-binary performers, showcasing a growing embrace of gender diversity. Similarly, 12 artists identify as people of color, contributing to the festival's multicultural ethos.

With an average artist rating of 7.2 (based on 76.9% rated acts), Best Kept Secret 2026 is poised to deliver a high-quality experience for music enthusiasts. The festival’s eclectic mix of genres—from funk and soul to experimental rock and Afrobeat—ensures there’s something for everyone, whether you’re seeking introspective indie or high-energy electronic sets.
